title: Gravlex Launchworks
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Gravlex Launchworks''', a corporation that had been established on [[Gravlex Med/Legends|Gravlex Med]], developed huge [[Cannon/Legends|cannons]] designed to hurl [[Starship/Legends|starships]] into space. Once [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight]] and [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] systems were created, the Launchworks were used to hurl garbage from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] into its star.

[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] researchers came to Gravlex Med to learn the secrets of Gravlex Launchworks in an attempt to integrate their technology into the design of a new [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. The Empire soon discovered that the Launchworks was useful for discarding failed experiments, as all evidence would be incinerated by the sun. Thus, an endless supply of garbage, hazardous waste, and other detritus was shipped to Gravlex Launchworks by the Empire for incineration. Bio-engineered [[virus]]es and bacteria eventually leaked out of the warehouses storing the garbage for processing, which caused massive amounts of environmental damage to Gravlex Med and nearly wiped out the native [[Anx/Legends|Anx]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-11-06 -->{{GamerCite|7|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Anx}}
*<!-- 2016-06-02 -->''[[Savage Spirits]]''
